[DQC.US.0204.10706] The concept us-gaap:PropertyPlantAndEquipmentGross with a value of 823,500,000 has been used with the axis PropertyPlantAndEquipmentByTypeAxis and the member us-gaap:ComputerSoftwareIntangibleAssetMember.
